title: Bake Your Bread
description: Bake Your Bread, Cookies, Cakes and Pies! Cook Your Beetroot Soup, Mushroom and Rabbit Stew and your Carrots!
body:
![Bake Your Bread!](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/refs/heads/main/ModProjects/Bake-Your-Bread/pres/title_banner.png)
# What does this mod do? > **Baked goods must be baked before you can eat them, cooked dishes must be cooked.** - They all require water or milk in the making. In turn you do get experience points from baking and cooking them. For that you can use the _furnace_, a _smoker_ and even a _campfire_. ### Can I eat the dough, though? > You _**can**_ try eating the intermediate steps like _Cookie Dough_ and _Uncooked Soup_. But consider that just like raw chicken, there might be a risk to being so greedy. If only it wasn't so tasty and after all, there really is only one way to find out... # Bake Your Bread! (...and more!) ### Bread and Cake ![Bread Dough Recipe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/refs/heads/main/ModProjects/Bake-Your-Bread/info/trans_bread_dough_craft_anim.gif) ![Unbaked Cake Recipe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/refs/heads/main/ModProjects/Bake-Your-Bread/info/trans_unbaked_cake_craft_anim.gif) ### Cookies and Pumpkin Pie ![Cookie Dough Recipe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/refs/heads/main/ModProjects/Bake-Your-Bread/info/trans_cookie_dough_craft_anim.gif) ![Pumpkin Pie Dough Recipe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/refs/heads/main/ModProjects/Bake-Your-Bread/info/trans_pumpkin_pie_dough_craft_anim.gif) # Cook Your Beetroot Soup! (...and more!) ### Beetroot Soup and Mushroom Stew ![Beetroot Soup Recipe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/refs/heads/main/ModProjects/Bake-Your-Bread/info/trans_uncooked_beetroot_soup_craft_anim.gif) ![Mushroom Stew Recipe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/refs/heads/main/ModProjects/Bake-Your-Bread/info/trans_uncooked_mushroom_stew_craft_anim.gif) ### Rabbit Stew ![Rabbit Stew Recipe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/refs/heads/main/ModProjects/Bake-Your-Bread/info/trans_uncooked_rabbit_stew_craft_anim.gif)
